description: Normalized geographic hierarchy with proper 3NF structure
Geographic location details for various contexts
Household completion and tracking status codes
Person tracking and relationship status codes

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE (
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) REFERENCES DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS (HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_PERSON_CORE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_PERSON_CORE (
	PERSON_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	PERSON_STATUS_ID BIGINT,
	DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID BIGINT,
	CURRENT_LOCATION_ID BIGINT,
	PERSON_NUMBER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	AGE BIGINT,
	FOREIGN KEY (HOUSEHOLD_ID) REFERENCES FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE (HOUSEHOLD_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (PERSON_STATUS_ID) REFERENCES DIM_PERSON_STATUS (PERSON_STATUS_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID) REFERENCES DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES (DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (CURRENT_LOCATION_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_DETAIL (LOCATION_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS (
	DECEASED_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	PERSON_ID BIGINT,
	PLACE_OF_DEATH_ID BIGINT,
	YEARS_SINCE_DEATH INTEGER,
	MARITAL_STATUS_AT_DEATH_CODE VARCHAR(30),
	EDUCATION_AT_DEATH_CODE VARCHAR(30),
	FOREIGN KEY (PERSON_ID) REFERENCES FACT_PERSON_CORE (PERSON_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (PLACE_OF_DEATH_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_DETAIL (LOCATION_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MIGRATION_GEOGRAPHY CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MIGRATION_GEOGRAPHY (
	MIGRATION_GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	MIGRANT_ID BIGINT,
	CURRENT_LOCATION_ID BIGINT,
	MIGRANT_RESIDENCE_ID BIGINT,
	STATE_OF_RESIDENCE_CODE VARCHAR(30),
	FOREIGN KEY (MIGRANT_ID) REFERENCES FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL (MIGRANT_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (CURRENT_LOCATION_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_DETAIL (LOCATION_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (MIGRANT_RESIDENCE_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_DETAIL (LOCATION_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR (
	MIGRATION_BEHAVIOR_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	MIGRANT_ID BIGINT,
	MIGRATION_REASON_ID BIGINT,
	YEARS_SINCE_MIGRATION INTEGER,
	FREQUENCY_OF_VISITING VARCHAR(20),
	PERMANENTLY_MOVED_INDICATOR VARCHAR(20),
	FOREIGN KEY (MIGRANT_ID) REFERENCES FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL (MIGRANT_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (MIGRATION_REASON_ID) REFERENCES DIM_MIGRATION_REASONS (MIGRATION_REASON_ID)
);
